description: Destroy tool. Pins the confirm-alone destroy gate and the bypassed DELETE. No-confirm rejections diverge: Go's gate returns its confirm message before validating service_type/alert_id, while Python validates path args first, and the two confirm messages differ (see report).

cases.name: confirm alone hits the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_monitor_service_alert_definition_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)

cases.name: deletes the monitor service alert definition
